# hyprland configuration

$mainMod = SUPER

monitor = DP-1, 1920x1080, 0x0, 1

general {
    border_size = 2
    gaps_in = 5
    gaps_out = 10
    col.active_border = rgba(cba6f7ee)
}

decoration {
    rounding = 10
    blur {
        enabled = true
        size = 3
    }
}

input {
    sensitivity = 0.0
    kb_layout = us
}

animations {
    enabled = true
}

# window rules
windowrule = float, ^(pavucontrol)$
